payload.trigger_phrase: you make your way to the bottom
payload.raw_text: Look at that. That's disgusting. All right, so you guys make your way down. No traps in the stair descent, but you make your way to the bottom of the stairs without issue. You don't see anything necessarily fishy. You do see these torches have been burning for a little bit, a couple hours, and are probably needing to be re-upped pretty soon. You guys eventually make your way down, and as soon as the last of you-- who's following up the rear in this, by the way? What's the marching order?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Look at that. That's disgusting. All right, so you guys make your way down. No traps in the stair descent, but you make your way to the bottom of the stairs without issue. You don't see anything necessarily fishy. You do see these torches have been burning for a little bit, a couple hours, and are probably needing to be re-upped pretty soon. You guys eventually make your way down, and as soon as the last of you-- who's following up the rear in this, by the way? What's the marching order?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I kill all of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sploosh!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I nudge my sister and say, all mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. That she is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He pulls one key and unlocks the small closet. You paid attention? (creak) Opens this rickety wooden door, and goes (grunt) and walks past, and he's behind the door, expectantly waiting. You guys glance into the space, and you can see there's what looks to be a low torchlight about every ten feet down a wooden stairway that descends about 30, 40 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Traps, people hiding, anything that seems out of place or dangerous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Traps, or people hiding?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Traps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll look for people hiding.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Perception check, investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Twinsies!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, it's ten minutes, before you know you're going to go into something, you stop and do this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's like you in Japan, baby!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I know. Taking a shower, I broke like two shower heads. Just turning around, I was like (crash).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The beds, was that like lying down on a saltine for you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah. My heels were just over like the--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We went into McDonald's and his head hit the ceiling!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are a kaiju!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: A kaiju from the deep! A level seven!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, wait, before we go any further.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god. Holy shit. Before we go any further, wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I have to be doing a short rest to do the Inspiring Leader thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's ten minutes, it takes to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, never mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, no, we could stand here for ten minutes!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no, please. Fucking say some words!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm new to the being an inspiring leader thing.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Slim pickings for room here. It's a bit early in the evening. That's when it's the busiest. Just find some space, sit down. Folks don't want you to sit by them? Don't fucking sit by them."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's exactly what I said, the real bar.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I like this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is like old times.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As soon as you begin having this conversation and taking in the atmosphere, one of four bar hands sees you approach. You see a jagged smile of a hairless man with ruddy skin that immediately comes up to you. "Aye, friends! New faces are few and far between here in Deastok. Welcome to our little slice of the family. What can I get you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, we brought bottles. That's rude, isn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The good stuff is down here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know where you got that shit but put that away. We'll get you right fucked up, eh?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have a shiraz?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'll see what I can muster."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I like these people!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He walks over to a table where you see what appear to be about five different patrons at the table. Most of them wealthily dressed. Two of them appear to be older mercantile or business owners, they wear the jewelry on their hands very extravagantly and displaying both wealth and prestige to an ostentatious way that you know most high-end guild workers or owners tend to display. You are very familiar with caste systems that have emerged in a lot of these central metropolitan areas, and so you can very easily pick up some of those themes. Two of them appear as a contrast very simply dressed. No jewelry. You can't make out any details in this distance and there is one man who he hands the drink to, he sets it down in front of him and slides it forward. The man you see there, he has deep brown skin, marked, there appear to be a number of tattoos that curl up his arms and up the side of his neck and touch his ears on each side. He's wearing light, billowing clothes of silver and maroon silks that end about the elbow and are just hanging beneath, leaving the rest of his arm completely visible where you can see the tattoo continues up the forearm and grasps the back of the hand, almost like he has a gauntlet on that is just his skin. You see around him a series of gold and silver bracelets and rings that adorn his fingers. His face is framed by a lion's mane of black and gray dreadlocked hair. Because of your perception check, at this distance and your ranger-like eyes, you can see what you perceive to be a visible scar on his throat from ear to ear. He's currently mid-conversation with the patrons at the table, leaned back in his chair in a comfortable setting and as soon as the drink-- huh?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: One sex on the beach! (laughter)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The Change-Bringer is the deity that looks over luck, looks over adventure, travel, the open road. That's as much as you can glean from your passing knowledge of the deity. Since you are not a woman of faith, obviously, you don't know much beyond that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (slurring words) Should we sent him a Change-Bringer's Nectar? Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, Pike!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (still slurring) I only had like three drinks. Three sips.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Keep going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just tiny sips.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: They were so small.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Drink some, maybe some water, too, in between each sip.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Maybe some meat pie.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's whiskey. That's supposed to be-- never mind. Go ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, who's the Change-Bringer? Does anyone know? I feel like this drink is inspired. Can I do a check to see?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a religion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Aw, I'm not good at this. Pike, you know gods!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Let me see if I know. Will I know the Change-Bringer?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, please. I have no idea. I definitely have zero idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to see if I can think of it. 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's really not that hard. The Change-Bringer is Avandra. Avandra, one of the gods of the pantheon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Yeah, of course we knew that.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you walk back to the group, a little dejected, Vax, since you're the one who's paying attention the most at this point, you notice as the goliath gets this small grin on the side of her face and continues to go back to the drums.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are there any weapons around her feet or where she's sitting or playing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Three.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She has very nice boots. And as a man who has made boots in the past, you can acknowledge, those are very well-made boots.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Me Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I just love the alacrity that Travis goes to two, three. It's so good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You play good!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The head slowly turns and the eyes focus for a second in the dim, snow-blind looking pupils, and gives you a nod.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice hair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Head turns a little to the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll be-- if you--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Tell her she has nice boots, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Tell her she has nice boots.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice boobs!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (bang) Big drum hit, and her part of the song comes to a halt. The two other bits of music alter but continue the beats, and she just--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Boots. Nice boots. Bidet. And I go back to the group.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: About 20 additional minutes go by. Another round is bought at the table, with Korshad still slowly, very carefully sipping the drink that you guys bought for him. Doesn't appear to be slowing, doesn't appear to be breaking. You can keep waiting if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll be-- if you--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Tell her she has nice boots, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Tell her she has nice boots.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice boobs!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (bang) Big drum hit, and her part of the song comes to a halt. The two other bits of music alter but continue the beats, and she just--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Boots. Nice boots. Bidet. And I go back to the group.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you walk back to the group, a little dejected, Vax, since you're the one who's paying attention the most at this point, you notice as the goliath gets this small grin on the side of her face and continues to go back to the drums.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You charmed her!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look at you!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Nice work, de Bergerac!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But Grog doesn't see it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll be your Cyrano!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So what's the next order of business, guys?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is that conversation breaking up?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's what I planned on doing, is waiting out that conversation. I in no way want to interrupt it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "It's an acquired taste. It's made from a very long-distilled, 40-year processing of a heavy mint leaf, and that, when it's been very thickly fermented, is mixed in with this very sour port base that's been repeatedly funneled and sifted until it's become almost thick in its own right. That's mixed together with a few other sugars and a bit of a special fruit. Honestly, I think it tastes pretty shitty, but it's what he likes."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You mean the Korshad drink?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want one of the Korshad drinks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of the Korshad drinks, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would assume you've already had this stuff at this point. We've been sharing a cup around. This is too much for a human being to handle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you go to the bar?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll go up to the bar. We don't know his name, do we? The bartender's name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You haven't asked him yet, no. There are a few barhands that walk around, but the one you've been going with, you can go ahead and catch his eye as you go through the area. "Hey, do you need something?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course, darling. I didn't catch your name.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh! Wence."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wence, thank you so much. Could I grab another of those fabulous five-gold drinks there, that you brought to our friend?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, you want Schlond's Embrace. Okay. If you're sure about that."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, what is it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Another 20 or so minutes pass in the tavern.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you really have a jewel-encrusted-- you do, in your fucking Bag of Holding?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not anymore, it's getting marked off now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sweet. I'm going to clean that shit out, pour it in.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The interior of that bag looks like the Pirates of the Caribbean ride. It's a little weird in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is a silver and pewter chalice that contains a number of multi-colored gems embedded along the sides, going to the base.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is gorgeous.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Lil' Jon would be proud. It's beautiful.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Taryon. You drink out of this one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That drink?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're the one that bought him the drink. Look like you're drinking it, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. Pinky out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How is it? Do you like it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I love it. (whispers) It's terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll just laugh, way too loud. (laughs) And then she said to me, that's not armor!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I have given your father a date of six months to pay this debt. If it is not paid, then the deeds, as agreed upon many years ago, transition to my name entirely. I am not going to kick your family to the street; I am not a terrible man. But I will be possessing all of your belongings."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I can make magical items, if there's something that you need made or enchanted. We have other members of the group that do different things. We have a fine tinkerer, if you need something made for you. Vex here is an excellent shot. She could put on an archery show or something, if that would be something worthwhile to you. You know, if that will help ease the debt. I know my family owes you quite a bit of money.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 230,000 gold. If we're hearing correctly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You are correct. For the time being."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And might I inquire, as it is my family's debt: what is the timetable on that? Will you be coming to collect anytime soon?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Roughly 120 miles east of here lies a sinkhole. It has swallowed the core of the platinum mines of Herethis a few months back. Now, those mines are a very lucrative point of business for my employers. And every time we've sent scouts to inspect the source of this erosion, none have returned. Many very capable and proven men, unheard again. One of our greatest diviners has since spoken of a powerful force within this mine. Ancient. Birthed improperly. But now seems to grow more and more mad. We're at a loss, so we've put out a contract or two, but nothing has taken a bite yet. If you were to go to this mine, find this entity that has ruined our mining operation there, return with proof of its demise, and we confirm its destruction, I will consider our task complete."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That is not a deal. The residential and the farm territory is to become mine. I would leave for them your estate and enough gold to live a comparably comfortable lifestyle than living on the street for years to come. They could then strike out on their own, start a new fortune if they wish. Perhaps land barony was not their strong suit. You seem to have found other pursuits, maybe you could lead them in a new path."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And past that point, they would be in no debt to you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Past that point, and a task done in our favor by the famed Vox Machina. Maybe."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Would they get to maintain possession of their personal property? Artwork, statues?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Everything that remains within the estate home itself would be yours to keep. The rest is mine."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And what is this task?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You're in the evening now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Port Demali.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you wish to contact me, you can send a missive to Vashlow, or if you have access to a practitioner of the arcane arts, perhaps a Sending would be sufficient."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sending, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Definitely.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. Well, stand by. We'll call you. Thank you for your time, and we'll be in touch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well. It was just business."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorry about your horse.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Eh. Fair trade." She gets up and gathers her little satchel over the side of her shoulder. "Until we meet again." She nods and then walks out into the darkness of the night.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Never to be heard from again because we'll forget that we have that connection. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so what are you guys doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's Misty Step. Let's Wind Walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Misty Step tonight and then that way we can recover everything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: In the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, what time is it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yes. All right, so you guys go ahead and transform into your misty forms via the Wind Walk spell and begin making your way to the east, towards the Herethis Wood. Travel is pretty rapid. It's a clear sky. The moon's still pretty-- it's only been a few days since the last full moon when you guys had the ritual up at the top of the mountains with the Trickfoots, so it's very easy to see the details, especially those of keen vision. Rather rapidly, you find yourselves to the outskirts of the Herethis Forest, and after doing a couple passes overhead, you can see there is a portion of the forest that is open, and there you can see there are a couple of stone towers set up. There appear to be large ropes and cables fastened at the edges of what looks to be a large circular ravine, some sort of an entry port, a very large hole in the ground. And as you approach and get close you can see that, while there are two standing towers, there appear to be remnants of two other towers that have fallen in, and looking at some of the cables and the way that some of the equipment is set up, it appears that this sinkhole that he spoke of that consumed a portion of this entryway, whether it be a quake or something, a lot of the structure that was placed around the outside of the mine has fallen in, and is precariously being held either dangling over the inside by cable work or has crumpled somewhere at the bottom of this abyssal hole you see before you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sending, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Definitely.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. Well, stand by. We'll call you. Thank you for your time, and we'll be in touch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well. It was just business."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorry about your horse.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Eh. Fair trade." She gets up and gathers her little satchel over the side of her shoulder. "Until we meet again." She nods and then walks out into the darkness of the night.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Never to be heard from again because we'll forget that we have that connection. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so what are you guys doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's Misty Step. Let's Wind Walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Misty Step tonight and then that way we can recover everything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: In the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, what time is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're in the evening now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's Misty Step there--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Misty Step is a very different spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We go 30 feet. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to be windtalkers.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You guys land near the edge of this crumpled rock and you see where the ground itself has curled in and collapsed inward, and there are a number of cables or ropes that go across and various large structures, the stone towers that sit at the edge of this opening. You can see there's tension on these ropes and either the rope's going to snap at some point as the weather gets harsher over here, or the rock is going to crumble in if the ground keeps eroding. You're not sure if it's done, or if it's a slow crawling thing. There before you, you see a body. You can see elements of clothing, torn and dried, crusted with old blood. You see a boot that's left off to the side. The foot's been removed, but it looks like the edge of it's been torn and ripped a bit. The skeleton's been picked clean.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Like something was eating them?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can we speak to dead?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Pike can do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you two misty there, somebody start setting up camp for tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll go with Pike and we can stealth in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll start setting up camp.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You can still misty. We're still misty-able. You can fly in, talk to them, and fly back out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She can't talk to them as mist.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I mean, land and then--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay. I'll cast Pass Without a Trace, anyways, so we'll be stealthy going in. So I do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so. Is it just you, Pike? Who's going with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm already standing by the bodies, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you go back to the bodies with them?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you're still out there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so the three of you are turning back to mist and making your way back toward the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to set up the tents.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We'll say Druidcraft, which is a very localized and cantrip-based magic, you could, over the next couple hours craft a single web hammock. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Corpse called it a small one, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It called it a small one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're good. We've still got to camp for the night, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. We're camping. But we should camp in the trees, y'all. Not in the ground, in case the things come up out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the thick forest of Herethis surrounds the mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I Druidcraft some web hammocks?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I mean you can, I mean we've gone to all this trouble, but if we want to add to it. I mean, this is just what we've been doing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look, I really like elaborate tree houses.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I understand. I respect the art form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can have a rope bridge here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hammock bed.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Temporary hit points last until they go down or you take a long rest, I believe. Let me double check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That chalice, while it looks quite delightful, is not worth a thousand gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's from Medieval Times.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) It's a little gaudy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's got Michael's. Michael's crafts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, every time you drink from it you get glitter on your hands and you're like, shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How do you turn it off? Cover it in blankets.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yay, Heroes' Feast.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're immune to fear?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're immune to fear, immune to poison, and--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Advantage on wisdom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Marisha, you want to go ahead and roll the additional hit points for Heroes' Feast?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah 2d10, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 2d10, I believe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're losing our 17?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Lose our 17 from the speech?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's why I didn't take them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) Ooh! Wait, yeah! Ooh, that's amazing! It's a nine and a ten!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So 19 additional hit points to all of you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If you give us a speech, how long does that last?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Temporary hit points. They last until they're depleted or you finish a long rest. Yes, I was correct. Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But then at the top of the morning, I can give us another speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Should you be so inclined, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I have to do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, you don't. You don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck you, Travis. Fuck you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can give the essence of a speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right, I can do an interpretive dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Only if you actually do the interpretive dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wait, 19 extra?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's giving you a look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A laser light show. With fireflies. It's like in a Disney Imagineer show.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, well, it's a speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can give the essence of it, but the idea here is just you honing your public speaking skills.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're going to get better at it, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like public debate in high school.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Toastmasters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I love Toastmasters.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. We'll say for the purpose of brevity, because even at your guys' level if you did encounter anything in this forest that was indigenous, you'd splatter it in a round. But you don't have any issues. Nothing really sees you up in the branches. You occasionally get caught off guard by the sound of a nearby (hooting). It's an owl in the trees. But nothing seems to bother you during your evening slumber. You complete your long rest. You still maintain your benefits from the Heroes' Feast, and as morning comes, Keyleth gives a rousing speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Should you be so inclined, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I have to do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, you don't. You don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck you, Travis. Fuck you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can give the essence of a speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right, I can do an interpretive dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Only if you actually do the interpretive dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wait, 19 extra?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's giving you a look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A laser light show. With fireflies. It's like in a Disney Imagineer show.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, well, it's a speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can give the essence of it, but the idea here is just you honing your public speaking skills.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're going to get better at it, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like public debate in high school.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Toastmasters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I love Toastmasters.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Temporary hit points. They last until they're depleted or you finish a long rest. Yes, I was correct. Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So in the top of the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Top o' the mornin'!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. We'll say for the purpose of brevity, because even at your guys' level if you did encounter anything in this forest that was indigenous, you'd splatter it in a round. But you don't have any issues. Nothing really sees you up in the branches. You occasionally get caught off guard by the sound of a nearby (hooting). It's an owl in the trees. But nothing seems to bother you during your evening slumber. You complete your long rest. You still maintain your benefits from the Heroes' Feast, and as morning comes, Keyleth gives a rousing speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do I have to do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, you don't. You don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right, I can do an interpretive dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Only if you actually do the interpretive dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wait, 19 extra?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's giving you a look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A laser light show. With fireflies. It's like in a Disney Imagineer show.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, well, it's a speech.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can give the essence of it, but the idea here is just you honing your public speaking skills.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're going to get better at it, Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like public debate in high school.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Toastmasters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I love Toastmasters.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Temporary hit points. They last until they're depleted or you finish a long rest. Yes, I was correct. Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So in the top of the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Top o' the mornin'!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Which, actually, you are immune to fear, so it does not affect you. However, it shakes the interior and you watch as small stones (thud) hitting the ground around you. You guys, looking up above, you can see that this scream is affecting the structure a little bit. I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's contained, but it's still a single beam.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: A beam of red light.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you go ahead and get close on the broom.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And just start to see if I can make out what it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. You open up the hood of the light, and it immediately beams this stark red beam down on this portion, and you look at it. It is Celestial.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What does it say?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It appears to be runes of gestation and protection. It speaks of a seed, a guardian for ages to come: Symphior.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Symphior.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's an incubator. This isn't a coffin. It hatched.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So this is the opening of-- this is where it was.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it a guard cherub?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You notice as this pale white light begins to slowly appear a little ways ahead of you in the other side of the chamber. This light is emanating from some--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I snuff. The second.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And we back away from the thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys begin to drift back on the carpet, and you see this beacon of light hovering maybe ten feet up off the ground, about the same height that you guys were to the platform. And you see there what appears to be a cherub. It's a baby, or an infant, but it appears to be withered and gray, and its arms and legs hang limply, and it has these small, white angel-like wings, but the feathers are tattered and broken in places, and the head's lolled back, and as the glow grows from it, it goes (wheezes, screams) and gives out this heinous scream that echoes throughout the whole hall. You can't help but instinctually grab your ears. I would like you all to make a wisdom saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Advantage on!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty. 19 points of cold damage to you, Vex, and that is nine points of cold damage to you, Vax. And while you manage to pull out of this space of condensed cold, Vax, your sister, however, becomes stunned for one round as your body is frozen and locked in place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, sorry. Before the end of your turn, it's going to go ahead and use a legendary action to use a terrain shift.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But it's just a baby!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! We're in its lair!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. As you stab the creature, it (gasps). There's a horrible sucking sound as you dart back. It looks over in your direction. The wings flutter once and it brings its arms up, and as it does and you land next to your sister, you feel the air around you begin to freeze in cold. This energy's just (crackling). You feel ice crystals condense around, and both of you feel the air in your lungs suddenly begin to freeze up. I need both of you guys to make constitution saving throws.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks for coming right next to me on that one. Goddamn it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nice!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What am I doing, a constitution?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: No, he's fine. He can hold his breath for six minutes. He's got a really high constitution, so you're fine. You slowly pummel the rock out from his way and pull Grog out from the interior of the stone floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, it was an evil baby, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, nobody likes glitter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, glitter gets everywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we get out of here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (muffled) I don't mean to be rude!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I run over to Grog. I'm still an elemental, yeah? I am still an elemental. Where is he?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You don't know, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I saw it. I'll point down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You point. I earthglide and I find him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I can do double damage to structures. Can I beat him out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say you could probably, over time, yeah. You have enough constitution to be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to kill him by suffocating.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Wind Wall is stationary. It might help with one round of the spray.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Six points of acid damage, six points of acid damage, 12 points of acid damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How much further do we have to go up?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys, with the brooms and the carpet, it's not super fast. Putting up there again. You get about three-quarters of the way up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is Pike riding on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's on the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm on the carpet. I'm okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You should heal yourself!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a Wind Wall to protect us from around us?
